title: habenaria subauriculata
intro: Habenaria subauriculata, also known as the Indian Snake Root or Viper's Grass, is a type of orchid plant native to the tropical regions of India. The plant has been used in Ayurvedic medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Habenaria subauriculata include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and treat wounds. Herbal preparations of the plant include teas, decoctions, and infusions, which can be used to treat various ailments, although more research is needed to confirm its effectiveness and potential side effects.
